# Document

**Source:** https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/pc/datasets/histgrIndia.xls

---

Variables & FAQ
---------------

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| End Game | To report historical and expected growth rates in operating metrics. The historical growth rates are compounded, annual values (CAGR). |     |
|     |     |     |
| Variable | Explanation | Why? |
| Number of firms | Number of firms in the industry grouping. | Law of large numbers? |
| CAGR in Net Income (Last 5 years) | Average of compounded annual growth rate in net income over last 5 years, among firms that have been in existence > 5 years. Only includes firms with positive earnings five years ago and current year. | Historical growth rate in earnings. |
| CAGR in Revenues (Last 5 years) | Average of compounded annual growth rate in revenues over last 5 years, among firms that have been in existence > 5 years. | Past growth in revenues |
| Expected Growth in Revenues - Next 2 years | Average of analyst estimates of annual growth rate in revenues for next two years. | Analyst forecast of expected growth in revenues |
| Expected Growth in EPS - Next 5 years | Average of analyst estimates of annual growth rate in earnings per sahre for next five years. | Analyst forecast of expected growth in earnings per share |
